title: PlayerCodes
description: Player Codes lets players share their own live codes with friends and the community. Players must explicitly opt in to publish their codes, so everything is consensual and transparent. Perfect for servers, content creators,
body:
# 🌍 Overview

**Whether you’re managing a large multiplayer server or just want better control over player tracking, Player Codes gives you the tools you need.
You can view live player positions, check offline players’ last login coordinates, or quickly locate your last death or respawn point — all from an organized, easy-to-use menu.**

---

✨ Features

📍 **Player Location Finder**: Instantly view the exact coordinates of any active player.

📊 **Player Location Bar**: Displays player distance and position in real time.

☠️ **Death Location Finder**: Instantly shows your last death point for easy recovery.

💤 **Offline Player Last Login Finder**: View the last known location of offline players.

🔒 **Access Control**: Enable or disable player tracking access with simple permissions.

🛏️ **Player Bed Location Finder**: Quickly locate your personal or assigned bed spawn point.

⚡ **Respawn Location Finder**: Check and track current respawn coordinates after death.



---

## ⚙️ Configuration

**Fully customizable through the config file or in-game commandsv.**

**Choose who can view location data (admins, players, or ops).**

**Adjustable refresh intervals for performance optimization.**



---

### 📦 Installation

1. **Download the latest .jar file from Modrinth.**


2. **Place it into your game’s mods folder.**


3. **Launch the game and open the Player Codes menu.**


4. **Configure permissions and enjoy location tracking instantly.**
